title: WhiteBIT secures MiCA license in Austria ahead of July 1 EU deadline
summary: The Austrian authorization gives WhiteBIT access to the EU's unified crypto framework, which will require exchanges to hold MiCA licenses or stop serving clients after July 1.

title: Republican lawmaker proposes prediction markets insider trading ban, not including White House officials
summary: The bill did not specifically bar members of the US Congress from using the platforms or making sports bets, but prohibited policy wagers.

title: Latin American FX Edge Higher With Markets in ‘Holding Pattern’
summary: Most Latin American currencies advanced in a quiet session for global markets amid holidays in the US and parts of Asia, leaving assets in a holding pattern as traders await fresh news out of the Middle East.

title: Stocks Stall as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

title: Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion

Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion 
Prediction market giant Kalshi is exploring a potential IPO for 2027 or 2028 after annualized revenue surpassed $2 billion.

title: Charles Schwab Planning to Roll Out S&P 500 Prediction Markets With Cboe: WSJ
summary: Global financial institution Charles Schwab is the latest firm hoping to steal a piece of the growing prediction market pie.

title: House Republican Introduces Insider Trading Bill to Ban Lawmaker Prediction Market Bets
summary: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

title: TD Cowen says CME has the upper hand in lawsuit against CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
summary: "We expect CME will seek a preliminary injunction to block perps as the case proceeds," said TD Cowen's Jaret Seiberg.

title: Two Texas brothers admit to $8 million crypto robbery after holding family at gunpoint, face up to 20 years in prison
summary: Brothers Isiah and Raymond Garcia pleaded guilty to an armed $8 million crypto robbery and kidnapping in Minnesota.

title: Israel and Hizbollah agree ceasefire
summary: Oil price falls on hopes agreement will bolster US-Iran deal

title: Iran deal brings little relief for inflation-wary central banks
summary: Top policymakers not ready to ‘call the all-clear’ on global economy even as energy prices fall
